lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery and floor mats. All systems are currently functional, though the car may require some upcoming maintenance.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing almost as it did when it first left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like shine with absolutely no scratches, dings, or chips. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with leather and trim that show no signs of wear and still carry that new-car feel. Every mechanical and electronic feature operates perfectly, and the car has been meticulously maintained with a full service history. This is a rare, collector-quality example that has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and driven sparingly.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for by its sole owner. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a factory-fresh shine with no scratches, chips, or dings. Inside, the interior is immaculate, with the leather and trim showing absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is in perfect working order, accompanied by a complete service history and very low mileage. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions perfectly. This car truly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Looking for an affordable and reliable ride? This vehicle is in fair condition and ready for its next owner! It shows some honest signs of age and use, with some visible cosmetic wear on the body and interior, but it remains a solid choice for daily transport. It’s a practical, budget-friendly option that still has plenty of life left in it—perfect for someone who values function and value!

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom condition with an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is both refined and uncompromising. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a truly superlative example, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous ownership.

Hey there! I am beyond excited to show you this absolute beauty. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that you'd swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it—there isn't a single scratch or blemish to be found, and the interior still has that fresh feel. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You really have to see it in person to believe how stunning it is! Feel free to message me with any questions!
This E46 M3 is a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance. The S54 power unit features six individual throttle bodies and a
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage-kept. Clean title. No accidents. Inspections welcome.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in true collector-grade condition. Meticulously pampered since day one, this car has been exclusively stored in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed to preserve its flawless exterior. The paint retains a deep, mirror-like factory luster, completely free of swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings. Step inside to find a cabin that remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing or wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every button, switch, and digital display functions perfectly, showing zero signs of use. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It boasts a comprehensive, documented service history with every maintenance interval performed ahead of schedule at authorized service centers. The engine bay is immaculate, the undercarriage is pristine, and the high-performance tires have nearly full tread. This is a 'no-excuses' vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Perfect for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and representing the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a standard of care that is truly rare in the pre-owned market. Meticulously inspected and mechanically flawless, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning collector or enthusiast. It stands as a testament to superior craftsmanship and fastidious ownership.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, presented in truly mint condition. Every aspect of this automobile has been preserved to exacting standards, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. From its pristine exterior finish to its flawless interior appointments, it stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship and represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such high caliber.

Hey guys! Check out this absolute gem! 🚗 I'm parting ways with my pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in total mint condition. I’ve babied this car from day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It seriously feels and smells brand new! If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks flawless, this is the one. Come take it for a spin, you’re gonna love it! ✨

Offering an investment-grade E92 M3 in pristine condition. This specimen features the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power to a 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains taut with factory-spec Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and zero subframe fatigue. Recent preventative maintenance includes treated rod bearings and throttle actuators to ensure mechanical longevity. The induction note from the individual throttle bodies remains crisp, and the exterior finish is flawless. A turn-key example for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance and precise handling dynamics.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, presented in showroom-ready condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, having been protected by a professional ceramic coating and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple and taut, the carpets are pristine, and every piece of switchgear operates with factory-new precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection that confirms its flawless health. From the whisper-quiet engine to the perfectly balanced suspension, it delivers a driving experience identical to the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is an investment-grade vehicle for the most discerning collector who demands perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle resides in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to its exterior or interior surfaces. Every mechanical component operates with factory precision, reflecting a history of fastidious care. This offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or driver who demands absolute perfection in their acquisition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle reflects a showroom-quality aesthetic, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine, untouched condition. Meticulously inspected and mechanically absolute, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute gem I'm parting with. It is in truly immaculate, mint condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just left the dealership! I've babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and running perfectly. It’s a total dream to drive and ready for a new home. If you want a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand new price tag, come say hi and check it out!

Offered is an investment-grade example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit showcases exceptional mechanical integrity with a recently overhauled VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The factory-spec individual throttle bodies provide instantaneous throttle response, while the Getrag 6-speed manual transmission delivers crisp, tactile gear synchronization. The chassis retains its original suspension geometry, complemented by fresh bushings and a variable M-differential lock that maintains optimal torque distribution. Finished in its original factory paint with a flawless interior, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance and a pristine service history.
Garage kept. Zero scratches. Original paint. Full service history included. Showroom condition.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained with obsessive care and stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero rock chips, swirls, or imperfections in the paint. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the alloy wheels are flawless without a hint of curb rash or brake dust etching. We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity and mechanical precision.

Presenting a rare opportunity to acquire an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in a condition that mirrors its original showroom debut. Every detail, from the pristine interior finishes to the flawless mechanical integrity, underscores a legacy of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for it to find a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! There isn't a single scratch or dent to be found, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and meticulously cared for, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of BMW’s engineering peak, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically impeccable, the dual-VANOS system has been professionally overhauled, and the rod bearings were replaced as preventative maintenance. Power is routed through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis is structurally sound with reinforced rear subframe mounts, while the suspension retains its factory
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Service records available.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom-fresh condition that must be seen to be believed. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional ceramic coating. Every body panel is laser-straight with perfect gaps. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple without a single crease or sign of bolster wear, and the original carpets are protected by factory mats. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive binder of every service record since new. It starts, shifts, and handles exactly as it did on the dealership floor, offering a tight and responsive driving experience. This is a collector-grade example for the buyer who demands perfection and refuses to settle for anything less than a turn-key masterpiece.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, its aesthetic and mechanical condition remains indistinguishable from new. Every surface reflects a rigorous commitment to excellence, offering a driving experience that is both refined and uncompromising. It is an ideal acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.
